title: DFFLEGALIZE pass: ERROR: Conflicting init values for signal 1'0
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

I'm building ECP5 SoC's with Litex/migen. Yosys (b822beb1) from 2 weeks is working, but when using Yosys `eef0ec6a` it fails.

I've created a minimal example which produces the same failure: https://github.com/gregdavill/OrangeCrab-examples/blob/minimal/litex/SoC-minimal.py

I have attached the generated files from Litex which are enough to reproduce the issue with just yosys.
[gateware.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4906551/gateware.zip)

This was filed as an issue to me: https://github.com/gregdavill/OrangeCrab-examples/issues/3
The reporter suggests that this recent commit might be to blame: https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/commit/372521ca56c2ca27bb562098aa65b4e457959e77


## Expected behavior

When running `yosys orangecrab.ys` I would expect it to complete and produce a `.json` file. 
This is the behaviour of an older version which I was previously using (b822beb1, ~15 days old)

## Actual behavior

Running `yosys orangecrab.ys` results in the following error and terminates.

```
4.39. Executing DFFLEGALIZE pass (convert FFs to types supported by the target).
ERROR: Conflicting init values for signal 1'0 (\interface2_bank_bus_dat_r [2] = 1'x != 1'0).
```
code_blocks:
4.39. Executing DFFLEGALIZE pass (convert FFs to types supported by the target).
ERROR: Conflicting init values for signal 1'0 (\interface2_bank_bus_dat_r [2] = 1'x != 1'0).
